changes.before: The village came through the grey-green Lordaeron trees in ordinary morning light: two wagons pulled up beside the common, smoke lifting straight from damp thatch...
changes.after: The village showed through the grey-green Lordaeron trees in ordinary morning light: two wagons beside the common, smoke lifting from damp thatch...
changes.note: Compressed arrival description without losing the rural normalcy beat.

changes.before: Ordinary caution, ordinary denial; Lordaeron still working because nobody in the square had yet accepted that work itself was part of the trap.
changes.after: Ordinary caution. Ordinary denial. Nobody in the square had admitted yet that work itself was part of the trap.
changes.note: Shortened the explanatory clause and sharpened the internal rhythm.

changes.before: She found contamination in Millhaven's grain stores, well water, and dead...
changes.after: She found the taint in Millhaven's grain stores, the well, and the dead...
changes.note: Downshifted Jaina/Sylvanas explanation to civilian-facing speech.

changes.before: The back room of the common house had been built for barrels, trestle tables, and winter meetings, not seven fever pallets and a man trying to keep a village alive with boiled water and stubbornness.
changes.after: The back room of the common house had been built for barrels and winter meetings, not seven fever pallets and a man trying to keep a village alive with boiled water and stubbornness.
changes.note: Trimmed an unneeded object list while preserving pressure.

changes.before: The contamination answered at once, flaring through the crystal before she had settled her second breath...
changes.after: The taint answered at once. What she had seen as trace in corpses, spoiling grain, and well water at Millhaven was alive here...
changes.note: Kept Jaina's mage precision while reducing report-language density.

changes.before: The worst were a miller's assistant with flour still trapped under his nails, a baker's wife..., and a woman who had spent the past week helping the village prepare for an autumn gathering...
changes.after: The worst were a miller's assistant with flour still under his nails and a baker's wife who smelled faintly of yeast through the fever.
changes.note: Cut tertiary patient inventory and kept the useful bread-linked cases.

changes.before: Bread from the common pot. Bread at home. Bread with every meal in the worst cases... Water would have scattered the pattern differently...
changes.after: Bread from the common pot. Bread at home. Bread with every meal in the worst cases... If water were carrying it, the spread would jump house to house. This was steadier than that.
changes.note: Condensed repeated reasoning into a tighter causal chain.

changes.before: Jaina had expected satisfaction when the halves met. Instead she felt the speed of it—the ugly efficiency...
changes.note: Cut editorialized reaction and let the discovery beat land through action.

changes.before: This was the thing itself, dense and deliberate, worked through the kernels so evenly it would survive milling, kneading, baking, and the oven's heat...
changes.after: This was the thing itself, dense and deliberate, worked through the kernels evenly enough to survive milling, kneading, and the oven.
changes.note: Shortened mechanism recap while preserving the crucial method clue.

changes.before: Jaina eased one step sideways so he could see her as well as the bow, keeping Sylvanas in the edge of his sight.
changes.after: Jaina stepped sideways so he could see her as well as the bow.
changes.note: Removed camera-setting scaffolding before the interrogation.

changes.before: Jaina dropped beside him, fingers going to the throat first, then the crystal, then both hands spreading over chest and jaw as the magic flared white-blue...
changes.after: Jaina dropped beside him, fingers to the throat first, then the crystal. Warm still, a trace of foam at the mouth...
changes.note: Tightened the rescue failure beat and kept only the useful sensory detail.

changes.before: Jaina set her ward notes on Brek's scarred desk, pushed aside feverfew and ledgers to make room, and wrote until the instructions were clean enough for another mage to trust...
changes.after: Jaina set her ward notes on Brek's scarred desk, pushed aside feverfew and ledgers, and wrote until the instructions were clean enough for another mage to trust...
changes.note: Trimmed filler at the close without touching the handoff beat.

flags: Line 89: 'Breath sweet enough you can smell it from the next cot' kept — diegetic symptom report from Brek, not document voice.
Line 335: 'Andorhal' pivot kept blunt and short — fits Sylvanas's operational register.
No expander flags raised in polish mode; all cuts were line-level and did not expose an underwritten emotional beat that needed fresh expansion.

observations.finding: Opening village tableau had duplicate scene-setting nouns and filler prepositions.
observations.action: Compressed the setup while keeping one visual, one smell turn, and the safety-to-danger pivot.

observations.finding: Arrival paragraph explained denial twice.
observations.action: Split the thought into two short sentences and cut the longest explanatory tail.

observations.finding: Jaina/Sylvanas handoff worked, but Jaina's internal comparison over-explained Sylvanas's method.
observations.action: Kept the contrast and cut excess phrasing.

observations.finding: Farstrider placement paragraph carried one extra flourish about horse violence.
observations.action: Retained readiness and removed the joke extension.

observations.finding: Captain's question and Sylvanas's answer leaned toward briefing diction.
observations.action: Changed 'What's her read worth?' to 'What's she worth?' and 'contamination' to 'taint.'

observations.finding: Infirmary opening stacked room function, furniture list, and thematic summary.
observations.action: Cut one furniture item and kept the room pressure.

observations.finding: Brek symptom report was strong but Jaina's follow-on passage repeated the mechanism with too much polish-pass density.
observations.action: Shortened the scan description and reduced clinical phrasing.

observations.finding: Jaina's orders were clean and voice-true.
observations.action: Left the line intact after checking for dialogue register contamination.

observations.finding: Patient inventory overran its function.
observations.action: Kept bread-linked cases and cut the autumn-gathering aside.

observations.finding: The warding sequence had three separate pattern restatements.
observations.action: Collapsed them into one rhythm line ('Blue through amber, blue through amber').

observations.finding: Child dialogue already sounded human and plain.
observations.action: Kept the exchange, trimming only the lead-in and one reaction sentence.

observations.finding: Window paragraph described props, stool origin, and village improvisation in three separate passes.
observations.action: Trimmed object clutter and kept the impression of strain.

observations.finding: Bread-source deduction repeated itself with multiple 'repeated' phrases and a field-pattern clause.
observations.action: Tightened it into a cleaner reasoning ladder.

observations.finding: The certainty/hurry paragraph told the reader what the discovery meant twice.
observations.action: Reduced it to one short transition into the granary beat.

observations.finding: Square-to-granary bridge had duplicate staging and one sentence of reaction commentary.
observations.action: Cut the commentary and let the synchronized 'Grain' landing do the work.

observations.finding: Granary description mixed strong sensory grounding with an over-complete magical explanation.
observations.action: Preserved smell and ordinary-storehouse contrast, shortened the mechanism paragraph.

observations.finding: Jaina's shutdown orders stayed concrete and scene-usable.
observations.action: Kept them intact after checking against fake simplification and document voice.

observations.finding: Sabotage reveal was strong but carried two extra clauses around the vessel and arrow lane.
observations.action: Trimmed those clauses to speed the beat.

observations.finding: Interrogation dialogue was mostly clean, but the setup sentence over-framed the geometry.
observations.action: Reduced the staging and left the questions blunt.

observations.finding: Davan's 'be fast' exchange worked because the plain words cash out into a real threat.
observations.action: Kept the dialogue and only tightened Jaina's reaction line.

observations.finding: Captain follow-up repeated the emotional state around his lying.
observations.action: Cut one explanatory sentence and kept the hard pivot to orders.

observations.finding: Closet discovery sequence had one overbuilt medical-action sentence.
observations.action: Shortened the action chain and kept the failure immediate.

observations.finding: The boy's death aftermath was strongest when centered on Sylvanas's judgment and Jaina's helpless hands.
observations.action: Trimmed surrounding explanation and left the key lines to stand.

observations.finding: Strategic handoff to Andorhal needed plain, operational dialogue.
observations.action: Verified that Sylvanas and Jaina both speak in usable next-step terms, not memo abstractions.

observations.finding: Closing desk sequence had minor filler but the final Andorhal image still landed.
observations.action: Trimmed setup words and kept the wheel-loading final note.
